name: test_file_exists
doc: Validates that the configured CSV fixture exists.

name: test_file_exists_returns_false_for_missing_file
doc: Returns False when the configured file does not exist.

name: test_read_csv_returns_expected_dataframe
doc: Reads the sample CSV fixture into a DataFrame.

name: test_read_csv_returns_none_for_missing_file
doc: Returns None when attempting to read a missing CSV file.

name: test_drop_nan
doc: Drops rows that contain missing values.

name: test_drop_duplicates
doc: Drops duplicate rows from a DataFrame.

name: test_drop_columns
doc: Drops selected columns from a DataFrame.

name: test_rename_columns
doc: Renames DataFrame columns using a mapping.

name: test_change_column_type
doc: Converts a column to the requested dtype.

name: test_save_csv
doc: Saves a DataFrame to disk and creates parent folders when required.
